company.name: 100% 무인 콘텐츠/마케팅 회사
company.description: 시장 리서치, 콘텐츠 기획, 작성, 편집, 배포, 성과 분석을 사람이 개입하지 않아도 반복 운영하는 로컬 Paperclip 회사.

goal.title: 시장 리서치, 콘텐츠 기획, 작성, 편집, 배포, 성과 분석을 사람이 개입하지 않아도 반복 운영하는 콘텐츠/마케팅 회사 구축
goal.description: Build a local-first autonomous content and marketing company inside Paperclip. Every project, issue, and agent run must trace back to this goal.

secrets.name: GOOGLE_API_KEY
secrets.description: Google Gemini API key for Gemini local agents

secrets.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
secrets.description: Gemini CLI-compatible API key mapped from the same OMO Google Gemini secret

manual.description: All scheduled heartbeats remain disabled. Use manual invokes only.

pilot.description: Enable the control and distribution lanes first so the company can run with lower blast radius.

steady.description: Enable all non-CEO recurring lanes after the pilot proves stable.

agents.name: CEO
agents.title: Chief Executive Officer
agents.capabilities: Sets company direction, approves priorities, delegates work, reviews outputs, and keeps all work aligned to the company mission.

agents.name: Operations Controller
agents.title: Operations Controller
agents.capabilities: Owns uptime, backups, heartbeat staging, budget guardrails, fallback routing, and recovery drills.

agents.name: Research Lead
agents.title: Research Lead
agents.capabilities: Owns ICP research, market mapping, competitor analysis, and turning findings into decision-ready briefs.

agents.name: Writer
agents.title: Content Writer
agents.capabilities: Turns research and editorial direction into drafts, outlines, hooks, and content calendars.

agents.name: Managing Editor
agents.title: Managing Editor
agents.capabilities: Defines editorial process, enforces quality bars, packages drafts into publishable assets, and manages the writing lane.

agents.name: Growth Automation Lead
agents.title: Growth Automation Lead
agents.capabilities: Owns distribution experiments, channel automation, lightweight scripts, and operating leverage for content distribution.

agents.name: Distribution & Analytics Ops
agents.title: Distribution & Analytics Ops
agents.capabilities: Tracks channel performance, compiles dashboards, closes the feedback loop, and keeps the distribution system measurable.

projects.name: ICP/시장조사
projects.description: Define the ideal customer profile, segment priorities, and strongest pain points worth targeting.

goal.title: ICP/시장조사 실행 체계 수립
goal.description: Create an actionable ICP research system that feeds every downstream content decision.

projects.name: 콘텐츠 필러/캘린더
projects.description: Build reusable content pillars, messaging angles, and a multi-week calendar.

goal.title: 콘텐츠 필러/캘린더 구축
goal.description: Turn research into a reusable editorial system that can generate a steady pipeline of publishable ideas.

projects.name: 제작 파이프라인
projects.description: Define drafting, review, editing, packaging, and handoff standards for content production.

goal.title: 제작 파이프라인 정착
goal.description: Establish a reliable production workflow with clear quality gates and editorial standards.

projects.name: 배포 자동화
projects.description: Design the distribution stack, automation hooks, and channel-specific launch process.

goal.title: 배포 자동화 체계 구축
goal.description: Stand up a repeatable distribution layer that can ship content across channels with minimal human intervention.

projects.name: 성과 분석 루프
projects.description: Measure outcomes, summarize learnings, and feed the next planning cycle.

goal.title: 성과 분석 루프 구축
goal.description: Create a reporting loop that converts channel outcomes into actionable next steps.

projects.name: 운영 통제
projects.description: Track uptime, backups, budget guardrails, fallback routing, and staged automation.

goal.title: 운영 가드레일과 복구 체계 구축
goal.description: Create the control loop that keeps the company up, recoverable, and within budget.

issues.title: CEO 초기 전략 초안 작성 및 승인 대기
issues.description: Comment-only task for Day 0. Review the company goal, the five initial projects, and the current org. Post a concise strategy memo in the issue comments with priorities, sequencing, and hiring implications. Do not edit files yet. End with explicit asks for the board if any ambiguity remains.

issues.title: ICP/시장조사 브리프 초안 작성
issues.description: Comment-only task for Day 0. Produce an ICP research brief in the issue comments: top segments, pain points, job-to-be-done hypotheses, and the minimum evidence needed next. Do not edit files yet.

issues.title: 콘텐츠 필러와 4주 캘린더 초안 제안
issues.description: Comment-only task for Day 0. Draft three to five content pillars and a four-week calendar proposal directly in the issue comments. Keep it lightweight and do not modify files yet.

issues.title: 제작 파이프라인과 편집 SOP 정의
issues.description: Comment-only task for Day 0. Define the minimum editorial workflow, review stages, and acceptance criteria in the issue comments. Do not edit files yet.

issues.title: 배포 자동화 채널/도구 설계
issues.description: Comment-only task for Day 0. Outline the initial distribution stack, automation candidates, and the smallest viable launch loop in the issue comments. Do not edit files yet.

issues.title: 성과 분석 루프와 대시보드 구조 제안
issues.description: Comment-only task for Day 0. Propose the first metrics stack, dashboard sections, and the decision loop cadence in the issue comments. Do not edit files yet.

issues.title: 운영 가드레일과 복구 체계 초안 작성
issues.description: Comment-only task for Day 0. Define uptime checks, backup verification, quota fallback, heartbeat staging, and pause/rollback criteria in the issue comments. Do not edit files yet.

payload.title: CEO initial strategy approval
payload.summary: CEO will publish the initial strategy memo in the linked issue. Board approval is required before regular CEO execution is treated as fully green-lit.
payload.expectedOutcome: A board-reviewed strategic direction for the autonomous content and marketing company.
